subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, damp and beaded with mist, supports the signal head whose lit red lamp halos through the fog, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex misted and dew-damp, colors softened by the fog; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood faintly beaded with pre-dawn mist
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A rural forested two-lane intersection in dim pre-dawn light wrapped in fog and mist. The damp asphalt is dark and barely reflective, bearing a painted white stop line that fades into the murk, flanked by shadowy autumn conifers. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. The illuminated red lamp glows as a soft halo diffusing through the fog.

lighting.conditions: Dim pre-dawn, dense fog and mist
lighting.direction: Diffuse, directionless glow scattered by fog, no defined sun
lighting.shadows: Essentially no cast shadows; fog flattens depth, only the red lamp's halo pierces the murk
lighting.illumination_effect: Foggy low-visibility glow in which the illuminated red lamp blooms into a soft red halo and balloons appear as muted misted shapes

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the damp road vanishing into fog and the traffic light center-right emerging from the mist; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the halating red lamp
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool desaturated grey-green fog palette pierced by the warm red lamp halo and softened balloon colors
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Quiet, hushed, mysterious, faintly whimsical from balloons materializing in the mist
aesthetics.patterns: Fading lane markings dissolving into fog and rounded clustered balloon silhouettes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.depth_of_field: Shallow, fog compresses and softens the background
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, halating red lamp, and overlapping green balloon emerging from soft fog

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the fog-shrouded forest road in dim pre-dawn light, approaching the intersection where the red light halos through the mist and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the stop line emerging from fog; the green balloon clearly overlaps the halating red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the misted balloons continue to sway in the damp air.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the foggy forest intersection at dim pre-dawn; the single traffic light displays a steady red haloing through the mist, with party balloons tied to the post swaying.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the glowing traffic light and balloons out of the fog; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the painted stop line on damp asphalt in the fog; the red lamp stays lit and halating and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping misted balloon is clearly framed against soft fog.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; misted balloons continue to gently sway.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons move in the damp still air.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a fog-wrapped rural forest road in dim pre-dawn light toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady red, its halo blooming through the mist, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the damp air. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the painted stop line emerging from the fog. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the misted balloons still gently bobbing.
audio_description: Ambient pre-dawn forest sounds: muffled stillness, faint dripping from foliage, a distant bird, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Damp rustle of balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
